title: Calculate Sum of Even and Odd Numbers

content.problemStatement:
Write a C++ program that takes user input for a number `n`. The program calculates the sum of all even and odd numbers from 1 to `n`. The program uses a for loop and conditional statements to calculate the sums, and prints the sum of even and odd numbers separately.

---

sampleTestCases.output:
Sum of even numbers: 30
Sum of odd numbers: 25

Sum of even numbers: 6
Sum of odd numbers: 9
